New on the blog

Fresh answers to the questions Florida buyers are asking.

These articles come directly from the current DR. Mortgage USA publishing archive.

View the blog library →
01

Homeownership · July 8, 2026

Orlando FHA 203k Renovation Loan Basics for Buyers

Orlando FHA 203k renovation loan basics for Florida buyers: how financing repairs works, contractors, escrow, timelines, appraisal rules, and approval risks.

Self-employed · July 2, 2026

Florida Bank Statement Mortgage Loans for Self-Employed Borrowers

Florida bank statement mortgage loans for self-employed Orlando buyers: how they work, documents needed, risks, reserves, and questions to ask.

Read the article →03

VA loans · June 29, 2026

Florida Mortgage Gift Funds Rules for Homebuyers

Florida mortgage gift funds rules for Orlando buyers in 2026: who can give money, gift letters, bank statements, FHA, VA, and conventional rules.

Start with the question in front of you.

The complete resource library can connect every guide to its best calculator, related articles, and a clear next step.

Payment planning

Self-employed

07

How Florida assistance fits into the complete loan

Income, county, household, funds, education, and availability, without promising a program before review.

08

Loan estimates

How to compare two mortgage quotes

Rate, APR, points, lender credits, fees, cash to close, and the assumptions hidden in the payment.

09

Insurance
